requirement_topic.en: EMC - ACMA EMC Arrangements + CISPR / AS/NZS CISPR
requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容 - ACMA EMC安排 + CISPR / AS/NZS CISPR
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容 - ACMA EMC安排 + CISPR / AS/NZS CISPR

summary.en: Electrical and electronic devices supplied in Australia must meet ACMA electromagnetic compatibility requirements where the product is within scope. The mandatory obligation arises from ACMA radiocommunications labelling and EMC arrangements, including the applicable ACMA legislative instruments. For typical wireless/IoT products, suppliers commonly use CISPR 32 or AS/NZS CISPR 32 for multimedia equipment emissions, and related CISPR/IEC immunity or product-family standards where relevant. CISPR and AS/NZS standards are voluntary evidence routes; the mandatory requirement is compliance with ACMA EMC law and labelling obligations.
summary.zh: 在澳大利亚供应的电气电子设备如属于范围内产品，须满足ACMA电磁兼容要求。强制义务源自ACMA无线电通信标签和EMC安排，包括适用的ACMA法规文件。对于典型无线/物联网产品，供应商通常采用CISPR 32或AS/NZS CISPR 32作为多媒体设备发射证据，并在相关时采用CISPR/IEC抗扰度或产品族标准。CISPR和AS/NZS标准是自愿证据路径；强制要求是符合ACMA EMC法律及标签义务。
summary.zht: 在澳洲供應的電氣電子設備如屬於範圍內產品，須滿足ACMA電磁相容要求。強制義務源自ACMA無線電通訊標籤和EMC安排，包括適用的ACMA法規文件。對於典型無線/物聯網產品，供應商通常採用CISPR 32或AS/NZS CISPR 32作為多媒體設備發射證據，並在相關時採用CISPR/IEC抗擾度或產品族標準。CISPR和AS/NZS標準是自願證據路徑；強制要求是符合ACMA EMC法律及標籤義務。

standards_or_laws: Radiocommunications Labelling (Electromagnetic Compatibility) Notice 2017 - mandatory ACMA EMC labelling instrument
Radiocommunications Act 1992 - enabling legislation for ACMA EMC regulation
CISPR 32 / AS/NZS CISPR 32 - multimedia equipment emission standard (voluntary evidence route)

summary.en: In China, EMC evidence for IT, multimedia, and wireless products often uses GB/T 9254.1, which is aligned with CISPR 32 for emissions, and GB/T 17618 or related standards for immunity. Products listed in the China Compulsory Certification catalogue require CCC testing and certification through designated bodies. Chinese reports may be technically relevant but usually cite GB standards and Chinese market configurations rather than ACMA EMC instruments and Australian labelling requirements.
summary.zh: 在中国，IT、多媒体和无线产品的EMC证据通常采用GB/T 9254.1（与CISPR 32发射要求相对应）以及GB/T 17618或相关抗扰度标准。列入中国强制性认证目录的产品须通过指定机构进行CCC检测和认证。中国报告可能具有技术参考价值，但通常引用GB标准和中国市场配置，而非ACMA EMC法规文件及澳大利亚标签要求。
summary.zht: 在中國，IT、多媒體和無線產品的EMC證據通常採用GB/T 9254.1（與CISPR 32發射要求相對應）以及GB/T 17618或相關抗擾度標準。列入中國強制性認證目錄的產品須通過指定機構進行CCC檢測和認證。中國報告可能具有技術參考價值，但通常引用GB標準和中國市場配置，而非ACMA EMC法規文件及澳洲標籤要求。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 9254.1 - Information technology equipment; radio disturbance characteristics; limits and methods of measurement
GB/T 17618 - Information technology equipment; immunity characteristics; limits and methods of measurement
CCC - China Compulsory Certification where the product category is listed

gap.en: China EMC reports cannot be used as a complete Australian compliance file unless the Australian supplier can show the reports cover the same model, configuration, accessories, ports, operating modes, and applicable CISPR or AS/NZS limits accepted for ACMA purposes. The Australian supplier must classify the product, keep compliance records, and meet RCM labelling obligations. Re-testing to AS/NZS CISPR 32 or the relevant CISPR/AS/NZS standard is often needed when the China report does not identify the Australian compliance route.
gap.zh: 除非澳大利亚供应商能够证明中国EMC报告覆盖相同型号、配置、配件、端口、工作模式以及ACMA可接受的适用CISPR或AS/NZS限值，否则该报告不能构成完整的澳大利亚合规文件。澳大利亚供应商须完成产品分类、保存合规记录并满足RCM标签义务。当中国报告未识别澳大利亚合规路径时，通常需要按AS/NZS CISPR 32或相关CISPR/AS/NZS标准重新测试。
gap.zht: 除非澳洲供應商能夠證明中國EMC報告覆蓋相同型號、配置、配件、連接埠、工作模式以及ACMA可接受的適用CISPR或AS/NZS限值，否則該報告不能構成完整的澳洲合規文件。澳洲供應商須完成產品分類、保存合規記錄並滿足RCM標籤義務。當中國報告未識別澳洲合規路徑時，通常需要按AS/NZS CISPR 32或相關CISPR/AS/NZS標準重新測試。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory - ACMA EMC and labelling obligations apply to in-scope devices; CISPR / AS/NZS standards are voluntary evidence routes
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for CCC-listed products; otherwise Chinese GB/T EMC reports are commonly used as voluntary or contractual evidence

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] ACMA EMC compliance is a separate Australian market-access obligation. CISPR 32 / AS/NZS CISPR 32 evidence may support compliance, but Chinese GB/T or CCC EMC files do not automatically satisfy ACMA labelling and record-keeping requirements.
compliance_verdict.zh: 【仅供参考】ACMA电磁兼容合规是独立的澳大利亚市场准入义务。CISPR 32 / AS/NZS CISPR 32证据可支持合规，但中国GB/T或CCC EMC文件不会自动满足ACMA标签和记录保存要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: 【僅供參考】ACMA電磁相容合規是獨立的澳洲市場准入義務。CISPR 32 / AS/NZS CISPR 32證據可支持合規，但中國GB/T或CCC EMC文件不會自動滿足ACMA標籤和記錄保存要求。
